org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout

Class FigureLayoutUndoableEdit

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.undo.AbstractUndoable
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout.FigureLayoutUndoableEdit
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Undoable

    public class FigureLayoutUndoableEdit
extends AbstractUndoable
    Standard implementation of an undoable edit that is able to apply a layout of figures and revert it.
    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    NetEditor Figure Layout $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:08
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-figlayout

      Add a removal of a control point.
      void addLocationChange(Figure figure, float x, float y)
      Add a change into the undo edit.

      String getPresentationName() 
      boolean isEmpty()
      Replies if this edit is empty, ie it contains no change.

      • FigureLayoutUndoableEdit

    • Method Detail

      • getPresentationName

        public String getPresentationName()

      • add

        public void add(Undoable edit)
        Add the undoable edits from the given edit.
        Parameters:
        edit -

      • addLocationChange

        public void addLocationChange(Figure figure,
                     float x,
                     float y)
        Add a change into the undo edit.
        Parameters:
        figure - is the figure to move.
        x - is the new position of the figure.
        y - is the new position of the figure.

      • addControlPointRemoval

        public void addControlPointRemoval(EdgeFigure<?> figure,
                          int position)
        Add a removal of a control point.
        Parameters:
        figure - is the figure from witch the control point may be removed.
        position - is the position of the control point to remove.

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()
        Replies if this edit is empty, ie it contains no change.
        Returns:
        true if there is no change inside; otherwise false.

        doEdit in class AbstractUndoable
